title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Gaveno Cavailia 100% Natural Cotton Thick Absorbent 450 GSM Hampton [Pack of 4-Purple, Bath Towel (70x120 Cm)
features: Extra soft 100% cotton Towel. Exceptionally soft to the touch with lasting thickness and absorbency. Luxuriously soft with silky and lustrous plant fibres, beauty from nature

100% cotton improves with use and lasts longer than conventional cotton used under similar Conditions. Due to its softness and strength 100% cotton is recommended for people with delicate skin, and it has a much higher 'comfort factor' Than regular cotton
100% cotton luxurious 450 gsm towels are available in 4 sizes [ bath Sheet, jumbo bath Sheet, bath towel & hand towel ]
Size(s): [ Hand Towel - 50x80 Cm ] / [ Bath Towel - 70x120 Cm ] / [ Bath Sheet - 80x140 Cm ] / [ Jumbo Bath Sheet - 80x170 ]
Machine washable. Wash at 40 °C. Wash before use. Wash dark colours separately. Do not bleach
description: Product Description Extra Soft Supreme Egyptian Cotton Towel. Exceptionally soft to the touch with lasting thickness and absorbency. Luxuriously soft with silky and lustrous plant fibres, beauty from nature. 100% Cotton Improves With Use And Lasts Longer Than Conventional Cotton Used Under Similar Conditions. Due To Its Softness And Strength 100% Cotton Is Recommended For People With Delicate Skin, And It Has A Much Higher Comfort Factor' Than Regular Cotton. Luxurious 450 GSM 100% Natural Cotton Towels Are Available In 4 Sizes (Bath Sheet, Jumbo Bath Sheet, Bath Towel & Hand Towel) And In 17 Beautiful Colours: Aqua, Black, Blue, Charcoal, Cream, Hot Pink, Lemon, Lime, Natural, Navy, Orange, Purple, Red, Silver/Grey, Teal, Walnut, White Size(s): Hand Towel - 50x80 Cm Bath Towel - 70x120 Cm Bath Sheet - 80x140 Cm Jumbo Sheet - 80x170 Cm Material: 100% Cotton Washing Instructions: Machine Washable. Wash at 40 °C. Wash before use. Wash dark colours separately. Do not bleach. Drying Instructions: Tumble dry. Do not dry clean. Gaveno Cavailia committed to offering quality products, covering the likes of wholesale bedding and accessories as well as a range of bedding and linen, bed sets, bedspreads, bed sheets, comforter sets, foam collections and children bedrooms to offer something for everyone, and with so much to choose from. YOU WILL BE SPOILT FOR CHOICE. Safety Warning Keep away from fire.
